parsed_review.recommendation: Approve CP00-134 terminal review closeout readiness pack and proceed to pack closeout; handoff to CP00-135 / RP03.P00.M00.S01 is correctly fixed.
parsed_review.rationale: The staged diff adds a synthetic, metadata-only Risk C boundary catalog (terminal-review-closeout-readiness-catalog.js) plus matching contract JSON, README, tests, and contract-validation script edits. Coverage is correct: 65 rows spanning RP02.P09.M06.S08 (first) through RP02.P09.M10.S04 (last) across five micro phases with counts M06=13, M07=20, M08=20, M09=8, M10=4 (sum 65); unit ids are unique and contiguous within each micro phase. Domain result counts resolve to review_question=15, security_audit=8, test=3, ui_leak=3, claude_review_packet=3, closeout_decision=24, terminal_handoff=9 (sum 65), and deliverable counts to implementation=40, claude_review=11, security_audit=8, test=3, ui=3 (sum 65); these match the module's validate function, the unit test assertions, and the validation script's requireEqual checks. All required behaviors are present and inert: risk_register.writes_risk_register=false, finding_routing_map.routing_executes=false, pass_with_findings_requires_adjudication=true, block_prevents_production_ready=true, human_approval grants_human_approval=false, claude_review_packet.executes_claude_review=false, command_rerun.command_rerun_executed=false, permission_bypass executes_permission_bypass=false, ui_leak renders_ui=false, audit_completeness emits_audit_event=false. CP133 inheritance is wired (inherited result count 10, handoff to CP00-134/RP02.P09.M06.S08, inherited permission-bypass no-execution and ui-leak no-render). Every case result is frozen through freezeNoWriteResult with the full no-write attestation (19 flags all false), and the script loops all 65 results asserting no policy mutation, no audit/product/database write, no idempotency/lock persistence, no retry/rollback/compensation, no export/share, no AI/analytics, no claude/hermes runtime, no LDIP, and no leaked counts/hidden field names. Contract JSON terminal_review_closeout_readiness_pack, public_exports (11), hidden_source_fields (13), and no_write_attestation mirror the module constants and all 11 exports exist and are re-exported via index.js. The module performs no runtime side effects: command_anchors and replay_command are inert strings, no UI/API route is registered, no fetch/fs/db calls exist, HRX stays embedded (no split), and LDIP is not implemented. The micro-phase phase_role/title labels are an orthogonal planned-phase axis while behavior_kind is a rotated review template applied per micro phase; this is the established, validated pattern for this CP1xx series and violates no stated guarantee, so it is not a finding. No P0-P3 issues identified.
